Candidate Interest Form (2027-28 Program):
Please complete all questions below to receive further updates about CUNY Tech Prep. To clarify, this is NOT the CTP application.
We're planning on contacting interested folks starting in Winter 2026. For now, send questions to recruiting@cunytechprep.org or check out cunytechprep.org. 

NOTE: Unfortunately, due to city policy, students cannot participate in more than one Tech Talent Pipeline (https://techtalentpipeline.nyc/) program during their time at CUNY.

CTP's 2027-2028 Program is open to students who:
- will be attending a CUNY senior college in Fall 2027
- have completed a course in Data Structures
- are a Computer Science or related undergraduate major
- have NOT completed another TTP funded program, such as a CUNY 2X Residency program
- are 18 years or older, do no make more than $50,000/year, and are legally able to work in the United States

Best,
The CTP Team

PS - To learn more and keep up to date with CTP news, you can also sign up for our newsletter.
Sign in to Google to save your progress. Learn more
